props.name: horizontalPosition
props.description: Horizontal position of the notification container.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: verticalPosition
props.description: Vertical position of the notification container.

props.name: horizontalPosition
props.description: Horizontal position of the notification container.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: verticalPosition
props.description: Vertical position of the notification container.

props.name: action-text
props.description: Text for the optional action button. When provided, displays a clickable link button.

props.name: animation-direction
props.description: Direction the notification animates from when appearing or disappearing.

props.name: message
props.description: The notification message text to display.

props.name: progress
props.description: Progress value from 0-100. Use -1 to hide the progress bar. Only applies when type is "progress".

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: The notification type which determines the visual style and icon.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the notification is visible.
